title: daemon: DirectoryListParams Vec<UserInfo> unbounded allocation; no WS message size limit
description: daemon/src/relay.rs:284 iterates and clones params.online/offline from DIRECTORY_LIST without any size cap. The daemon's WebSocket client (transport.rs) passes no WebSocketConfig so there is no incoming message size limit. A compromised relay can force O(N) allocation in all daemons. Fix: add MAX_DIRECTORY_ENTRIES cap and truncate before cloning; pass WebSocketConfig with max_message_size=1MiB to client_async_tls_with_config.
